description: Controls whether raw URLs (not in repo_registry.json) are permitted for mounting. Default: false (fail closed).
rationale: All repos must be registered in repo_registry.json with alias, allowed branches, and auth method. Raw URL pulls bypass alias resolution, branch allowlists, and workspace isolation. Set to true only for emergency one-off operations with ADR justification.
override_requires: ADR at sovereign level + human approval. Temporary only.
